servicesSection.title: What We Do
servicesSection.subtitle: From mission-critical database operations to AI-ready data lakehouse platforms — we deliver enterprise data resilience across the full spectrum.

about.title: Enterprise Data Resilience & AI-Ready Platforms
about.text: DataLead Consulting is an enterprise data resilience partner for mission-critical environments. We design and operate secure, high-availability, and rapid-response data platforms. With 25+ years of expertise across Oracle, PostgreSQL, IOMETE, and open-source technologies, we serve government agencies, banks, telecom, and large-scale digital enterprises. Our team manages 1,700+ databases, 8 PB+ of enterprise data, with 99.98% uptime and 4-minute critical incident response.
